ZNTL_DOCTEST_SNAPSHOT_MISMATCH at test/fixtures/doctest/mutator_spec/mismatch.md:5 (dt_pw5xqssdxx1dtjfb5b4rye6v6c)
documented transformation is not produced by any stable mutator
--- before ---
fn add(a: i32, b: i32) i32 {
    return a + b;
}
--- documented after ---
fn add(a: i32, b: i32) i32 {
    return a * b;
}
